# GitHub Copilot — Project instructions

Full project rules live in **`PROJECT_RULES.md`** at the repo root. When suggesting code in this repo, follow that file.

**Short reference:**

- **Stack:** React (Vite), TypeScript, Tailwind only, Framer Motion, react-i18next (en/es), React Hook Form, pnpm.
- **Brand:** Use Tailwind colors `ink`, `studio`, `graphite`, `mist`, `paper`; product accents `amber`/`green` only on project cards. Fonts: Space Grotesk + Space Mono. Use `NytsuLogo` for the logo; product cards get accent bar + "Designed by Nytsu."
- **Code:** Functional components, Tailwind utilities only, no new CSS files. All copy via i18n (`t('key')`). Keep animations subtle.
- **File names:** Use **kebab-case** for all new files (e.g. `my-component.tsx`, `use-auth.ts`). Hooks: `use-*.ts`.
- **Don’t:** Use Montserrat or raw #000/#FFF; don’t put amber/green in header/footer.

For full rules and details, see **`PROJECT_RULES.md`**.
